teams.name: Teams
teams.description: Two teams compete — last team standing wins

sudden_death.name: Sudden Death
sudden_death.description: All maxed out, one hit kills — pure skill

deathmatch.name: Deathmatch
deathmatch.description: Most kills wins — respawn after death

king_of_the_hill.name: King of the Hill
king_of_the_hill.description: Control the center zone to score points

kick.name: Kick
kick.description: Walk into a bomb to kick it

remote_bomb.name: Remote Bomb
remote_bomb.description: Bombs don't auto-detonate — press E to trigger

line_bomb.name: Line Bomb
line_bomb.description: Places a line of bombs in facing direction

bomb_throw.name: Bomb Throw
bomb_throw.description: Press Q to throw a bomb 3 tiles ahead
